subcodes.first_line: The Call of the Ancient King hath been raised from His Most Great Prison, when He was in the hands of the oppressors, and He summoneth the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندآء مالک القدم من سجنه الاعظم اذ کان بین ایدی الظالمین و یدع الناس
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
